location: Drops from Page enemies. The earliest reliable spot is the underground hall beneath Tombsward Ruins in Weeping Peninsula, defended by two Pages.
tactics: At the center of Tombsward Ruins, stairs lead down into a dark hall guarded by two Pages — clear them for a shot at the bow.
That same underground room ends in a chest containing the Winged Scythe — don't mistake grabbing that chest for getting the bow; the bow is a Page drop, not the chest item.
Pages look fragile but fight in pairs and poke with fast rapier thrusts; try to pull them one at a time back up the stairs rather than engaging both at once.
Drop rate is only about 4%, and Pages/Noble Pages elsewhere (Caria Manor, Raya Lucaria Academy, Redmane Castle, Shaded Castle, Leyndell) can also drop it if the early roll doesn't land.
lore: A finely polished bow of red wood, crafted by a skilled artisan and issued to the pages who serve the throne — built to reward a steady hand over brute strength.

builds.name: Early Dexterity archer
builds.why: D scaling in Dexterity with only 8 Strength required makes it one of the strongest low-level Dex bows available early on.

builds.name: Bleed/Dex rogue hybrid
builds.why: Light weight and Dex scaling complement a dagger or katana Bleed build wanting a cheap ranged poke option.
